prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 97.9 kg; Height 169.4 cm; BMI 34.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.2%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.7%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 293mg/dL; 9 months ago 286mg/dL; 6 months ago 269mg/dL; 3 months ago 268mg/dL; current 216mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 97.2kg; 9 months ago 97.3kg; 6 months ago 96.8kg; 3 months ago 98.2kg; current 97.9kg), Height (12 months ago 169.4cm; 9 months ago 169.4cm; 6 months ago 169.4cm; 3 months ago 169.4cm; current 169.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 34.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 119U/L; 9 months ago 119U/L; 6 months ago 129U/L; 3 months ago 129U/L; current 127U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 52U/L; 6 months ago 52U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 50U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 65mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 67mL/min/1.73m²; current 66mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 31mg/g; 9 months ago 23mg/g; 6 months ago 23mg/g; 3 months ago 23mg/g; current 28mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 163mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
